definition: maximum guaranteed additional quiescent dc supply current per input, of an HCMOS IC, at specified supply voltage, zero output current and a temperature range between specified temperatures (T_1} and T_2})

definition_ml.en: maximum guaranteed additional quiescent dc supply current per input, of an HCMOS IC, at specified supply voltage, zero output current and a temperature range between specified temperatures (T_1} and T_2})

remark: Applies to a sub-category of HCMOS circuits with TTL compatible inputs. |Except for the relevant input, to which a voltage of V_CC} - 2.1 V (V_OH} for TTL) must be applied, all other inputs must be either be at zero (GND/V_SS}) or at supply voltage level (V_CC}).

remark_ml.en: Applies to a sub-category of HCMOS circuits with TTL compatible inputs. |Except for the relevant input, to which a voltage of V_CC} - 2.1 V (V_OH} for TTL) must be applied, all other inputs must be either be at zero (GND/V_SS}) or at supply voltage level (V_CC}).
